fabricated_divergences.quote: German-language sources explicitly note the absence of Ukrainian confirmation of the Konstantinovka capture claim, while Vietnamese-language sources present the capture as confirmed with extensive quotes from President Putin and Russian military commanders and no Ukrainian government response.
fabricated_divergences.why_unsupported: Article 9 (Vietnamese, VnExpress) is described as 'also noting unconfirmed Ukrainian military accounts describing a severe crisis and the city becoming a "gray zone".' The Vietnamese source therefore does NOT present the capture as confirmed without any Ukrainian counter-narrative; it explicitly flags the claim as unconfirmed and includes Ukrainian accounts of crisis, undermining the claimed contrast with German coverage.
